---
title: 'About'
description: 'Pinexio is a customisable, modern documentation template designed to help developers create, manage, and present their project documentation effortlessly. With support for MDX, light and dark themes, and a powerful content management system, Pinexio makes documentation easy and fun!'
date: 2025-03-12
---

Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS 4, MDX, and Contentlayer for beautiful, fast,
and flexible documentation.
